_patch_meta.description: Dimension Review C13 Reg 70 (greed): 4 groups assigned. 2 dimension changes: 892-001 Emotion-Positive→Emotion-Negative; 893-001 Volition→Moral Character. Registry stamp set.

set.notes: Inner vulnerability to snatching alongside divine security of being held by God. Security pole (Joh 10:29) is the stronger inner characteristic. Automated label confirmed.
Divine catching away of the person — eschatological/protective. God's act directly takes person into divine presence. Genuinely dual subject. Automated label confirmed.
Greed as inner condition of rapacious desire. AV Mat 23:25 names inner fullness of greed directly. Changed from Emotion — Positive (clear error) to Emotion — Negative.

operations.description: 892-001 harpagē — greed: Emotion — Negative, HUMAN (changed from Emotion — Positive)

set.notes: Greedy person as moral-character type — stable inner disposition constituting idolatry. Changed from Volition to Moral Character — names a character type, not a volitional act.

operations.description: 893-001 pleonektēs — greed: Moral Character, HUMAN (changed from Volition)
Registry 70 (greed): Dimension Review complete under v2.2
